name: Be Passionately in Love
overview: After her college entrance examination, Xu Zhi became the greatest winner in Ruijun Middle School, but she didn't expect that she was about to be defeated in love.

trailers.title: [ENGSUB] 🔥Be Passionately in Love Trailer | Staring Liu HaoCun & Wang AnYu | Chinese Drama | 陷入我们的热恋
